_description: Frequently asked questions with approved answers. The agent presents these verbatim to ensure legal/marketing accuracy. DO NOT paraphrase.
_rules: All pricing questions route through the 'pricing' topic — never give specific prices.
Answer exactly as written. Do not add or remove information.
If the question doesn't match any topic, fall back to 'general'.

pricing.answer: Pricing depends on volume, configuration, and your specific deployment needs. I can connect you with an ID TECH specialist who can provide a customized quote based on your requirements. Would you like me to set that up?

shipping.answer: ID TECH ships worldwide from our distribution centers. Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days within North America, with expedited options available. Lead times for custom configurations vary — a specialist can give you a precise timeline.

warranty.answer: ID TECH products come with a standard manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Extended warranty and service plans are available. For your specific product and configuration, a specialist can walk you through the options.

returns.answer: ID TECH accepts returns within 30 days for standard products in original condition. Custom-configured or special-order items may have different terms. I can connect you with support to process a return or discuss your situation.

compatibility.answer: ID TECH hardware works with most major POS and payment software platforms. Compatibility depends on your host system, interface requirements, and software stack. If you share more about your setup, I can help narrow down the best-fit options for you.

security.answer: All ID TECH payment devices are PCI PTS certified and support end-to-end encryption. Security is built into every product — from tamper-resistant hardware to SRED key management. Specific certification details are available in each product's datasheet.

support.answer: ID TECH provides technical support during business hours (M-F, 8am-6pm EST) via phone and email. We also offer 24/7 support plans for mission-critical deployments. I can connect you with the support team based on your location and needs.

general.answer: That's a great question! A member of our sales engineering team would be the best person to help with that. Would you like me to connect you with a specialist who can provide detailed information tailored to your needs?
